text: Doug is the groom and the wedding is on Sunday.
At 9 PM, Doug was seen on the hotel roof.
At 9 PM, Doug was at the pool bar on the ground floor.
Doug's bachelor party started at Caesars Palace.
We thought Doug was on the roof, but he has now been found at the wedding chapel.
Doug never left the hotel suite all night.
A taxi dropped Doug at the airport at 11 PM.
